profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Johannesburg South Africa — significant channel mismatch. US operations at Lake Charles LA (within STOLA reach) but primary technology decisions made in South Africa. Channel mismatch flag applied.

signals.signal_title: Sasol CIO launches GenAI program — 10-30 use cases developed with zero initial investment
signals.signal_description: Group CIO Lungile Mginqi initiated a generative AI program in 2023 starting with a zero-cost phase using volunteer developers, resulting in 10-30 GenAI use cases developed internally. Microsoft Copilot deployed across enterprise. Phase 2 with investment commitment planned for 2024. CIO publicly presented at CIO Day South Africa 2023 on the AI governance and guardrails framework.

spend_model_flags.ms_standardized_notes: Microsoft Copilot and Microsoft 365 confirmed. Azure confirmed as cloud platform. SAP on Azure likely. Softchoice/WWT licensing opportunity may exist for US operations.
spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: CIO Lungile Mginqi is externally active and driving GenAI agenda publicly (+2 CIO signal). Microsoft Copilot confirmed deployment (+2 MS AI platform signal). GenAI program with 10-30 use cases in production (+4 AI budget/program signal, though cost was initially zero). Score 13 — below ≥15 threshold. Notable for a South African company — above average for the region.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Johannesburg South Africa — significant channel mismatch. US operations at Lake Charles LA (within STOLA reach) but primary technology decisions made in South Africa. Channel mismatch flag applied.

enrichment_notes: FY TTM revenue ~$13.9B USD (fiscal year ends June 30). 27,411 employees. Revenue >$10B triggers OEM deduction. HQ Johannesburg = channel mismatch. CIO Lungile Mginqi confirmed and active. Microsoft Copilot + Azure + SAP confirmed. No incumbent MSP found. South Africa country multiplier applies (Step 3). AI maturity 13, below threshold. US Lake Charles chemicals complex is the main WWT entry point.
